## OBJECTIVES
- IMMEDIATE OBJECTIVE: Verify PDFs (setup sheets, Bernina B700 manual, Inkscape/Ink-Stitch/Potrace/SVG PDFs) produced real extracted text.
- OVERALL OBJECTIVE (section S01): Turn the static knowledge repository into an active decision-making system with mandatory retrieval, source citation, decision traces, memorialization, and a knowledge graph.

## INPUTS YOU MAY READ
- this step file
- authority/00_MASTER_CONTRACT.md

## THE ONE ACTION
Sample ingested PDF objects from knowledge_objects.jsonl and confirm non-empty text (or a recorded extract_error) for each; write a verification sample.

## COMMAND(S) TO RUN
```bash
python3 - <<'PY'
import json,os
p='knowledge_object_library/knowledge_objects.jsonl'
pdfs=[json.loads(l) for l in open(p)] if os.path.exists(p) else []
pdfs=[o for o in pdfs if o.get('kind')=='pdf'][:20]
ok=sum(1 for o in pdfs if o.get('text','').strip() or o.get('extract_error'))
print('pdf objects sampled:',len(pdfs),'accounted:',ok)
PY
```

- [ ] Sampled PDF objects each have real extracted text OR an explicit extract_error.
- [ ] No PDF object silently has empty text with no error recorded.
